← All tools

Step-by-Step Equation Solver

Type a linear or quadratic equation and watch it get solved one small move at a time — with a plain-English reason for every step. Everything runs in your browser.

Try:

Solution, step by step

Check the answer

2x + 3 = 8  →  2x = 5  →  x = 5/2

Type an equation above (any single letter works as the variable) or tap an example — you'll get every step, why it's allowed, and a final check of the answer.

Nothing you type leaves this page · a max tool
